import os
from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE


# ── Deck Constants ───────────────────────────────────────────────

SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.33)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)
MARGIN = Inches(0.6)
CARD_BG_HEX = "#1E293B"
CARD_BORDER_HEX = "#334155"
BACKGROUND_HEX = "#0A0F1E"
PRIMARY_BLUE_HEX = "#3B82F6"
LIGHT_BLUE_HEX = "#60A5FA"
WHITE_HEX = "#FFFFFF"
MUTED_TEXT_HEX = "#94A3B8"
FONT_PRIMARY = "Calibri"

TOTAL_SLIDES = 6


# ── Color Helpers ────────────────────────────────────────────────

def hex_to_rgb(hex_color: str) -> RGBColor:
    """Convert a hex color string to pptx RGBColor."""
    hex_color = hex_color.lstrip("#")
    r, g, b = int(hex_color[0:2], 16), int(hex_color[2:4], 16), int(hex_color[4:6], 16)
    return RGBColor(r, g, b)


# ── Reusable Helpers ─────────────────────────────────────────────

def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex=BACKGROUND_HEX):
    """Fill the entire slide with a solid background color."""
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)
